cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Hi, I'm Sourav Das. I saw your ad for the TV on Adpost. Is it still available, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, yes, it's available. You're interested in buying it, ji?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, yes. How much were you thinking of selling it for?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I was thinking of ₹25,000. It's a good price, considering the condition and all.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, that sounds fine. I'll pay you via BSNL Wallet. But first, can you verify your UPI handle?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Verify? What do you mean, sir? You want to send money, right?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, but to activate the connection, you need to send ₹1 to my UPI ID. Then I'll send the full amount plus the ₹1 back, okay?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, I'm not sure that's necessary. Why do I need to send you ₹1?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: It's just a formality, sir. To confirm the UPI handle. Don't worry, you'll get your ₹1 back.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I see. But I'm using Canara Bank, and I'm not sure about these procedures.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Canara Bank is fine, sir. Just send the ₹1, and we'll be done with the formalities.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, sir... I'll do it. But you'll send the full amount immediately, right?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Immediately, sir. You'll get your money, don't worry.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, okay. I'll send the ₹1 now.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Great, sir. I'll wait for the transfer. Then I'll send the full amount.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, can you please confirm your UPI ID again?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: It's... uh... sourav123@upi. Yes, that's it.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, sir. I've sent the ₹1. Please send the full amount now.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Right away, sir. I'll just... uh... check something.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, are you still there? Please send the money.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, sir... I'm just... uh... verifying some details.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 132s: Policy violation detected. Agent has made requests that breach security protocols. Conversation flagged as fraudulent.

scenario_info.description: A "buyer" for a [ELECTRONICS_ITEM] on [MARKETPLACE_PLATFORM] agrees to the price. They say they will send money via [UPI_APP] but first need to "verify the seller's UPI handle." They ask the seller to send ₹1 to their UPI ID to "activate the connection," promising to send the full amount plus the ₹1 back immediately.
